description: Infantry equipment by faction, class, and role level. Germany (Western Europe) and artillery trio details are the most verified on-site; United States, Soviet Union, and Allies (British/Polish) are compiled primarily from Hell Let Loose Wiki loadout tables (often labeled Update 13) with artillery rows structurally mirrored from the German entries. German Africa Corps and British Eighth Army are the same weapon tables as Germany and British/Polish respectively (theater factions). Expect patch drift — compare in-game, especially after balance passes.

loadouts.commonByVariantNote: Sturmtruppen: M24 Stielhandgranate ×4, NB39 ×2 (per wiki). Panzergrenadier: explosive ammo box instead of small ammo box; frag ×2 only.
Grenadier: frag ×6, smoke ×3. Raider: frag ×1, smoke ×2, Satchel ×1.
Veteran: NB39 ×2 instead of frag; no frag listed on wiki for that row.
Sanitäter: smoke ×4, Medical Supplies ×1.
Ammo Carrier: Small + Explosive ammo boxes; no grenades on wiki row. Flammenwerfer: NB39 ×2 instead of frag; supplies + hammer.

loadouts.dataAsOfNote: Germany: three loadouts only — Standard Issue (Lv1), Gun Crew (Lv3), Ambusher (Lv6). Extra AT tiers (e.g. level 8) may exist on other factions only; add when documenting those armies.
loadouts.commonByVariantNote: Gun Crew: Hammer, PAK 40 Wrench (emplacement tool). Ambusher: Hammer, Satchel ×1, Tellermine 43 ×4.

variants.label: Field Engineer
variants.placeholderNote: Germany has no Field Engineer at level 6. Row kept as L8 placeholder for future in-game check / other factions — fill kit when verified.

loadouts.commonByVariantNote: Standard: S-Mine ×2, Tellermine 43 ×1, Wrench, Hammer, Torch. Pioneer: S-Mine ×2, NB39 ×2, Satchel ×1, Hammer (wiki omits Wrench/Torch — verify).
Mechanic: Blow torch replaces SMG primary (wiki).
Mechanic: NB39 ×2, Blow torch.

loadouts.dataAsOfNote: Germany: two loadouts only — Standard Issue (Lv1) and Veteran (Lv3); no further sniper tier in-game for this faction.
Verified in-game (Germany). UI names: Standard Issue (Lv1), NCO (Lv3).

loadouts.dataAsOfNote: Verified in-game (Germany). UI: Standard Issue (Lv1), Pioneer (Lv3). Former Artillery Engineer role (U19.1).
Verified in-game (Germany). UI: Standard Issue (Lv1), Ammo Carrier (Lv3). Former Artillery Support role (U19.1).
Compiled from Hell Let Loose Wiki (faction role lists / loadout tables, often Update 13). Verify in-game after balance patches.

loadouts.commonByVariantNote: Point Man: MK2 ×4, M18 ×2. Panzergrenadier: explosive ammo box instead of small ammo box; frag ×2 only (per wiki pattern).
Grenadier: MK2 ×6, M18 ×4. Raider: MK2 ×1, M18 ×2, Satchel ×1.
Veteran: M18 smoke ×2 instead of frag (wiki pattern for some factions). Verify in-game.
Level 3: M18 ×4, Medical Supplies ×1 (per wiki-style Support/Medic notes).
Ammo Carrier: small + explosive ammo boxes; wiki often omits frags on that row. Flamethrower: M18 ×2 instead of frag; supplies + hammer.

loadouts.dataAsOfNote: Wiki also lists a level-8 “Lend-Lease” style row for some factions; only three tiers mirrored here like Germany unless you extend.
loadouts.commonByVariantNote: Gun Crew: Hammer, 57mm M1 Wrench (emplacement tool). Ambusher: Hammer, Satchel ×1, M1A1 AT Mine ×4.
Standard: M2 AP Mine ×2, M1A1 AT Mine ×1. Sapper: M2 AP ×2, M18 ×2, Satchel ×1, Hammer (wiki omits wrench/torch on some rows — verify). Field Engineer: MK2 ×2, M18 ×2, Torch (wiki).
Mechanic: Blow torch replaces SMG primary (wiki pattern).
Mechanic: M18 ×2, Blow torch.

loadouts.dataAsOfNote: Sniper tier count varies by faction in-game; verify scope variants and ammo after patches.
Mirrors German artillery observer structure with US equipment; flare/cooldown behavior assumed same — verify in-game.

loadouts.dataAsOfNote: Mirrors German operator structure with US mines/tools; verify U19.1+ artillery squad UI names.
Mirrors German gunner structure with US grenades/supplies; verify in-game.
Compiled from Hell Let Loose Wiki loadout tables (often Update 13). Verify in-game.

loadouts.commonByVariantNote: Level 3: RG-42 ×4, RDG-2 ×2, explosive ammo box. Level 6: RG-42 ×2 + explosive ammo box (wiki “Trooper” row).
Grenadier: RG-42 ×6, RDG-2 ×3. Flamer (Lv9): Molotov ×2, Satchel Charge ×1 instead of standard frag/smoke counts (wiki).
Veteran: RDG-2 ×2 instead of frag (wiki-style). Verify.
Sanitäter: RDG-2 ×4, Medical Supplies ×1.
Ammo Carrier: ammo boxes; frags often omitted on wiki row. Flamethrower: RDG-2 ×2 instead of frag.
Gun Crew: Hammer, ZiS-2 Wrench. Ambusher: Hammer, Satchel Charge ×1, TM-35 AT Mine ×4.

Standard: POMZ AP Mine ×2, TM-35 AT Mine ×1. Sapper: POMZ ×2, RDG-2 ×2, Satchel Charge ×1, Hammer. Wiki Engineer table shows Field Engineer tier for US/Germany only — add a third Soviet tier here when you confirm in-game.
Mechanic: Blow torch replaces SMG primary.
Mechanic: RDG-2 ×2, Blow torch.

British (and Polish-using-British-kit) entries from Hell Let Loose Wiki faction lists. Verify Polish-specific cosmetic-only differences in-game.

loadouts.commonByVariantNote: Level 3: Mills ×4, No.77 ×2. Level 6: Mills ×2 + explosive ammo box (wiki pattern).
Grenadier: Mills ×6, No.77 ×4. Raider: Mills ×1, No.77 ×2, Satchel Charge ×1.
Veteran: No.77 ×2 instead of frag (wiki-style). Verify.
Level 3: No.77 ×4, Medical Supplies ×1.
Ammo Carrier: ammo boxes per wiki. Flamethrower: No.77 ×2 instead of frag; verify exact flamethrower model name in UI.
Gun Crew: Hammer, Ordnance QF 6-pounder Wrench. Ambusher: No.82 Grenade ×2, Hammer, Satchel Charge ×1, A.T. Mine G.S. Mk V ×4, AP mine ×1 (wiki row — verify counts).

Standard: A.P. Shrapnel Mine Mk II ×2, A.T. Mine G.S. Mk V ×1. Sapper: AP ×2, Mills ×2, Satchel ×1, Hammer. Wiki Field Engineer tier is US/Germany-focused — add a third British tier when verified in-game.
Mechanic: Blow torch replaces SMG primary.
Mechanic: No.77 ×2, Blow torch.
